reason: Headless Linux environment missing system GUI libraries (libatk, libgtk, etc.) required by Playwright/Electron. Visual evidence scenario is registered at src/visual-evidence/scenarios/gh-152-review-queue-strip.ts and will pass when run in an environment with GUI support.

scenario.title: Review queue strip for PR batches
steps: Click a PR awaiting review item
Verify the queue strip appears with multiple PR rows and verdicts
Verify the active PR is highlighted in the strip
Click a different PR in the strip and verify the main area updates
Press Escape and verify review mode closes

assertions.description: A PR awaiting review item is visible in the inbox
Clicking a PR item opens review mode with the queue strip visible
The queue strip shows multiple PR rows with verdict chips
The currently selected PR row is highlighted in the strip
Clicking a different PR in the strip switches the main area
Pressing Escape closes review mode and returns to inbox

prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence

> ⚠️ Automated visual evidence was blocked due to missing system GUI libraries in the CI environment. A Playwright scenario is registered at `src/visual-evidence/scenarios/gh-152-review-queue-strip.ts` and will produce screenshots when run with proper display support.

### Scenario: Review queue strip for PR batches
1. Navigate to the inbox view
2. Click a PR awaiting review item
3. Verify the queue strip appears with multiple PR rows and verdicts
4. Verify the active PR is highlighted in the strip
5. Click a different PR in the strip and verify the main area updates
6. Press Escape and verify review mode closes
